title: Library Manager
subtitle: Track your coverage and find what you're missing.

coverage.fetching: Fetching discographies in the background. Coverage will fill in shortly.
coverage.empty: No coverage yet. Once your libraries finish syncing and discographies are fetched, your coverage appears here.

libraries.title: Libraries in coverage
libraries.hint: Uncheck a library to leave it out of the coverage math.

artists.title: Your artists
artists.subtitle: Open an artist to see which albums you're missing.
artists.empty: No artists yet. Sync a library to get started.

artist.noMissing: You have every release we know about for this artist.
artist.noMbid: No MusicBrainz match for this artist yet, so coverage isn't available.
artist.loadFailed: Couldn't load coverage for this artist.

album.noTracks: No tracklist available for this album yet.

discover.title: Discover
discover.subtitle: Search all of music to find artists and albums you don't have yet.
discover.hint: Type at least 2 characters to search.
discover.noResults: No matches. Try a different search.

follows.title: Following
follows.subtitle: Artists you follow. New releases surface in your missing list automatically.
follows.empty: You're not following anyone yet. Open an artist in Discover and tap Follow.

download.noLibrary: No download-enabled library yet. Set up Prowlarr + qBittorrent on a library first.
download.notEnabled: Downloads aren't enabled on that library.
download.ackMessage: Chordia ships no indexers or trackers. Downloads use the Prowlarr and qBittorrent you configured, and you are responsible for the legality of what you acquire in your jurisdiction.

queue.title: Downloads
queue.subtitle: Your download activity.
queue.empty: No downloads yet. Hit Download on a missing album to start one.
queue.pickHint: We weren't sure which release is the exact album, so pick the right one.

settings.title: Manager settings
settings.subtitle: Quality profiles and per-library download status.
settings.profilesHint: Downloads always pick the best available source within a profile's allowed formats.
settings.name: Name
settings.librariesHint: Enable downloads by configuring Prowlarr + qBittorrent in each library's chordia-library.toml.
